allow: Bash(node -e "const l = require\(''lucide-react''\); const names = Object.keys\(l\).filter\(k => k[0] === k[0].toUpperCase\(\) && typeof l[k] === ''object''\); const matches = names.filter\(n => /github|linkedin|twitter/i.test\(n\)\); console.log\(matches.length ? matches.join\('', ''\) : ''Not found''\); console.log\(''---''\); console.log\(names.filter\(n => /git/i.test\(n\)\).join\('', ''\)\); console.log\(names.filter\(n => /link/i.test\(n\)\).join\('', ''\)\);")
